home.heroSubtitle: A production-grade React starter with React Router, Zustand, and react-hook-form — typed, layered, and ready to ship.
home.featuresTitle: Everything you need to ship a real product
home.featuresSubtitle: A pragmatic toolkit composed of battle-tested libraries — no lock-in, no magic.
home.featureRouterBody: File-system-free, fully typed routes that scale as your app grows.
home.featureZustandBody: Slice-style stores with localStorage persistence for auth.
home.featureFormsBody: Uncontrolled inputs, minimal re-renders, accessible error messages.
home.featureTailwindBody: Tokens via @theme, dark mode out of the box, zero config.
home.featureModulesBody: Auth, Dashboard and Public each own their pages, hooks and stores.
home.featureTypescriptBody: Catch errors at compile time, ship with confidence.

about.title: Built for teams that have to ship
about.subtitle: Enjoy fast, reliable parcel delivery with real-time tracking and zero hassle. From personal packages to business shipments — we deliver on time, every time.
about.valuePredictableBody: Strong typing, strict lint rules, and explicit module boundaries — fewer surprises in code review.
about.valueBoringBody: We pick libraries that are stable, well-documented, and easy to replace. No silver bullets.
about.valueShipsBody: Auth scaffolding, modular routing, theming and forms are wired up so you can focus on your product.
about.howOrganizedP1: The codebase is split into three bounded contexts — auth, dashboard and public — each with their own pages, components, services and stores. A small shared layer (components/ui, hooks, lib, config) holds the building blocks.
about.howOrganizedP2: The router mounts a dynamic layout per route group, so the same layout primitives can be reused or replaced without touching individual pages.
